title: How Do Tool-Augmented LLM Agents Perform on Real-World Energy Analytics Tasks?
abstract: arXiv:2606.26346v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: Agentic benchmarks have emerged across general-purpose and domain-specific settings, including finance, coding, law, and drug discovery, yet energy-domain evaluations remain largely limited to static knowledge recall. This is a critical gap for a sector that requires live data retrieval, specialized regulatory and market knowledge, and multi-step quantitative reasoning under real-world constraints.   We present an empirical study of tool-augmented LLM agents on real-world energy market analytics tasks. Our evaluation environment includes 243 expert-curated problems across three categories: (1) Market Data Retrieval and Analysis, (2) Knowledge Retrieval and Interpretation, and (3) Advanced Quantitative Modeling and Decision Analytics. Tasks include price and demand analysis, tariff impact modeling, asset revenue and returns estimation, hedging strategy analysis, and optimization modeling, with problems spanning multiple difficulty levels.

Title: How Do Tool-Augmented LLM Agents Perform on Real-World Energy Analytics Tasks?
Abstract: arXiv:2606.26346v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: Agentic benchmarks have emerged across general-purpose and domain-specific settings, including finance, coding, law, and drug discovery, yet energy-domain evaluations remain largely limited to static knowledge recall. This is a critical gap for a sector that requires live data retrieval, specialized regulatory and market knowledge, and multi-step quantitative reasoning under real-world constraints.   We present an empirical study of tool-augmented LLM agents on real-world energy market analytics tasks. Our evaluation environment includes 243 expert-curated problems across three categories: (1) Market Data Retrieval and Analysis, (2) Knowledge Retrieval and Interpretation, and (3) Advanced Quantitative Modeling and Decision Analytics. Tasks include price and demand analysis, tariff impact modeling, asset revenue and returns estimation, hedging strategy analysis, and optimization modeling, with problems spanning multiple difficulty levels.
translated_title: 工具增强型大语言模型代理在真实能源分析任务中的表现如何？
translated_abstract: arXiv:2606.26346v1 公告类型：新论文 摘要：通用和特定领域的智能体基准测试已在金融、编程、法律和药物发现等领域涌现，然而能源领域的评估仍然主要局限于静态知识回忆。对于一个需要实时数据检索、专业监管与市场知识、以及在现实约束下进行多步骤定量推理的行业来说，这是一个关键缺口。我们提出了一项关于工具增强型大语言模型代理在真实能源市场分析任务上的实证研究。我们的评估环境包含243个由专家策划的问题，涵盖三大类别：（1）市场数据检索与分析，（2）知识检索与解读，（3）高级定量建模与决策分析。任务包括价格与需求分析、关税影响建模、资产收益与回报估算、对冲策略分析以及优化建模，问题涵盖多个难度级别。
tldr: 本研究首次针对能源领域，构建了包含243个专家策划问题的真实市场分析基准，评估了工具增强型大语言模型代理在数据检索、知识解读和高级定量建模方面的表现。
en_tdlr: This study presents the first empirical evaluation of tool-augmented LLM agents on real-world energy market analytics, using a 243-expert-curated-problem benchmark covering data retrieval, knowledge interpretation, and advanced quantitative modeling.
